# Bug fix

## Defect

- Symptoms and user impact:
- Reproduction and evidence:
- Expected behavior:
- Owning agent / reviewers:
- Base commit and branch:

## Diagnosis and fix

- Root cause:
- Existing system reused:
- Minimal files changed:
- Security/tenant/data impact:

## Regression proof

- [ ] Failing regression test added first or equivalent evidence recorded
- [ ] Formatting, lint, typecheck, tests, integration tests, and builds pass
- [ ] Adjacent negative/tenant cases pass

## Handoff

- Before/after evidence:
- Rollback and detection signals:
- Remaining risk:
- Draft PR:
